name: Ampoules
reason: Glass ampoules are glassware → Blue bin. (Cytotoxic-drug ampoules instead go Yellow.)

name: Blade
reason: Blades are sharps → White (translucent) puncture-proof container.

name: Blood Bag
reason: Blood bags are soiled/biological waste → Yellow bin.

name: Broken Glass
reason: Broken/discarded glass is glassware → Blue bin.

name: Catheter
reason: Catheters are contaminated plastic → Red bin.

name: Coffee Cup
reason: Uncontaminated general waste → Green bin (not biomedical waste).

name: Contaminated Cotton Swabs
reason: Soiled dressings/swabs are infectious waste → Yellow bin.

name: Dialysis Kit
reason: Dialysis tubing is contaminated plastic → Red bin.

name: Expired Medicines
reason: Expired/discarded medicines → Yellow bin.

name: Gloves
reason: Used gloves are contaminated plastic/rubber → Red bin.

name: Human Anatomical Waste
reason: Tissues, organs and body parts → Yellow bin.

name: Infected Linen
reason: Soiled/infected linen and dressings → Yellow bin.

name: IV Set
reason: IV tubing and sets are contaminated plastic → Red bin.

name: IV Bottles
reason: Plastic IV bottles are contaminated plastic → Red bin. (Glass IV bottles go Blue.)

name: Lab Culture Bottle
reason: Laboratory cultures and specimens → Yellow bin.

name: Lab Slides
reason: Glass slides are glassware → Blue bin.

name: Mask
reason: Used/contaminated masks → Yellow bin.

name: Metallic Body Implants
reason: Metallic implants → Blue bin with glassware/metals.

name: Needles
reason: Needles are sharps → White puncture-proof container.

name: Placenta
reason: Placenta is human anatomical waste → Yellow bin.

name: Plaster Cast
reason: Soiled plaster casts → Yellow bin.

name: Scalpel
reason: Scalpels are sharps → White puncture-proof container.

name: Scissors
reason: Contaminated sharp instruments → White puncture-proof container.

name: Syringe
reason: A syringe without its needle is contaminated plastic → Red bin.

name: Syringes with Needles
reason: A syringe with a fixed needle is a sharp → White puncture-proof container.

name: Trocar
reason: Trocars are sharp instruments → White puncture-proof container.

name: Urine Bag
reason: Urine bags are contaminated plastic → Red bin.

name: Vacutainers
reason: Plastic vacutainers are contaminated plastic → Red bin.

name: Vial
reason: Glass medicine vials are glassware → Blue bin. (Cytotoxic vials go Yellow.)

name: Wound Dressing
reason: Soiled wound dressings are infectious waste → Yellow bin.

name: Cardboard Box (Clean)
reason: Clean cardboard is general/recyclable waste → Green bin.

name: Newspaper / Paper Waste
reason: Clean paper is general waste → Green bin (not biomedical).

name: Food Waste (Canteen)
reason: Canteen food waste is general waste → Green bin.

name: Plastic Water Bottle (Uncontaminated)
reason: An uncontaminated bottle is general recyclable waste → Green bin.
